name: Kredair LLC
description_short: Kredair LLC is a Florida-based credit repair specialist offering dispute services, credit counseling, and credit building across all three bureaus with personalized customer service.
description_long:
Kredair LLC was founded by Renee Gomas, a Board Certified Credit Repair Specialist located in Jacksonville, Florida. The company was established after the founder personally repaired her own credit and identified gaps in the credit repair industry—specifically that many competitors either failed to educate clients, overcharged, or didn't take time to understand individual situations. Gomas holds multiple certifications including Board Certified Consultant, Certified Credit Score Consultant, FCRA certification, and Florida bonding as a Notary Public.

Kredair LLC offers three primary service tiers: the Standard Plan (disputing with all three credit bureaus, credit counseling, credit restoration, and credit building), the VIP Plan (everything in Standard plus additional comprehensive services), and the Couples Plan (designed for two individuals, married or otherwise). All services are delivered completely online to accommodate busy clients. Beyond direct credit repair services, Gomas operates two Facebook self-help groups encouraging customers to learn how credit works and avoid repeating past mistakes.

The company distinguishes itself through several factors: personalized, individualized attention to each customer; reasonable rates compared to competitors; education-focused approach rather than repair-only services; fast response times to customer inquiries; and the founder's emphasis on understanding each person's unique situation. A mortgage professional's recommendation specifically praised Renee's reasonable rates and outstanding results. The online-only model removes geographic barriers and accessibility constraints.

While the website demonstrates legitimate credentials and positive referrals, potential customers should note that specific pricing details are not disclosed on the Alignable profile, service timelines for dispute resolution are not mentioned, and the company's track record and complaint history cannot be assessed from this limited source. The reliance on Facebook self-help groups for customer education, while showing commitment to learning, may not provide the comprehensive credit counseling equivalent to nonprofit HUD-approved counselors.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Founder holds multiple relevant certifications: Board Certified Consultant, Certified Credit Score Consultant, FCRA certified, and Florida bonded
Services delivered completely online, making them accessible to busy individuals regardless of location
Operates two Facebook self-help groups to educate customers on credit mechanics and prevention
Three tiered service options (Standard, VIP, Couples Plans) allowing customers to choose appropriate level
Mortgage professional testimonial specifically praises reasonable rates and outstanding results
Emphasis on personalized, individualized attention rather than one-size-fits-all approach
Founder established the company specifically to address gaps in education and customer understanding
cons: No specific pricing information disclosed on the website, making cost comparison impossible
No timeline information provided for dispute resolution or expected credit improvement
Limited online presence beyond Alignable profile—no dedicated company website mentioned or linked
Only one formal recommendation visible on the profile despite years of operation
No information about company size, number of clients served, or complaint/resolution history
best_for: Individuals seeking credit repair who value education alongside dispute services
Busy professionals who need fully online credit repair without in-person appointments
Couples looking to repair credit together with a specialized plan structure
People seeking personalized attention and willingness to engage with learning resources
diagnosis: Kredair LLC is best for consumers seeking credit repair services who value education and personalized attention, particularly those who work best with online-only providers. The main caveat is the lack of transparent pricing and published service timelines, along with limited verifiable track record beyond a single mortgage professional's endorsement—prospective clients should request detailed pricing and performance metrics before committing.
services: Credit bureau disputes (all three bureaus: Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Facebook self-help group membership and education
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 6721 St Augustine Rd ste 24-1017, Jacksonville, FL 32217
